schedule.heading: Your monthly subscription
schedule.awaiting: Your subscription is active. Waiting for your coach to upload your training schedule — your subscription month starts the day the schedule is uploaded.
schedule.activeCard: Your training schedule started on {startDate} and runs until {endDate}.
schedule.motivation: Sticking to your training days this month is the key to results — every session you commit to brings you closer to your goal and to better health.
schedule.reminder: Your subscription is ending soon — it ends on {endDate}. Renew now to continue without interruption and keep your progress.
schedule.ended: Your subscription ended on {endDate}. Renew now to continue without interruption and keep your progress.
schedule.reminderSubject: Your Qwaam subscription is ending soon

coach.awaitingScheduleTooltip: The trainee has paid and their subscription is active, but no training schedule has been uploaded yet — their month starts the day the schedule is uploaded.
